name: baicalein
mechanism: American skullcap flavonoids are associated with anticonvulsant and anxiolytic activity; GABAergic signaling and broader neuroinhibitory effects have been proposed in preclinical work.
summary: American skullcap flavonoids are associated with anticonvulsant and anxiolytic activity; GABAergic signaling and broader neuroinhibitory effects have been proposed in preclinical work.
